text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Japanese Derby is almost upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, a press conference is being held for all the
Umamusume who are registered to run in the
race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa... I just took a peek inside, and there are so many reporters!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ungh, I'm shaking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is her first press conference, so it's only
natural for her to be tense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to suggest something to help calm her
nerves.
choice_data_list:
We can go eat anything you want when it's all
over!

We can go eat anything you want when it's all
over!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Really?! Anything I want?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... My ears aren't playing tricks on me,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And by anything, you mean... anything, correct?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Even the Carrot Overload Meat Mountain
Monstrosity Set at the ramen place everyone
goes to by the academy?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And... can we also drop by the diner afterwards so
I can grab an Ultimate Mega Max Carrot Tower
Parfait?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay... Just breathe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can do this. Press conference, red carpet—bring
it on!
choice_data_list:
Th-that's great to hear! (She's got a different
look in her eyes now.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Heheheh, you bet'cha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the encouragement, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You'd better pay close attention to the press
conference!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Special Week! You're next. Please get ready!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, okay! I'm coming!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is almost here! Tell us how
you're feeling, Special Week. What are your
motivations for participating this race?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course! Um...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to become the top Umamusume in all
of Japan. And that's why I decided to run in the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get stronger and win the Derby to show
both of my moms just how capable I've become.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I have one more reason for wanting to win.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You have another reason? Could you please
elaborate?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm standing here today thanks to a few people
who mean a whole lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mother who gave birth to me, my mother who
raised me, and...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The person who's been teaching me up until
now—my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to make my moms proud by being the best
in Japan! And I wanna make my trainer a Derby
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And that is why I will win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The room erupts into applause and cheers, and
Special Week looks over to me with a huge smile
on her face.
